name: Decopins2
short_description: "Decopins 2" is a sequel to "Decopins" a Decopin-type tower defense shooting game. Use traditional Japanese finger flick -Decopin- to repel the approaching donuts. Collect EXP and money to level up your Decopins. Depending on your level, you will also be able to use magic. This time, it's tougher...
detailed_description:
"Decopins 2" is a sequel to "Decopins" a Decopin-type tower defense game.

Use traditional Japanese finger flick -Decopins- to repel the approaching donuts and prevent them from escaping.

This time, the cafe has been renovated, and in addition to the donuts, hamburgers also try to escape.

Use decopin and magic to prevent the bastards from breaking defense lines.

This time, It will be tougher...

Collect EXP and money to level up your Decopins. Depending on your level, you will also be able to use magic.

*You can enjoy simple operations, mainly using the mouse and keyboard.
*Implemented settings for adjusting the volume of BGM and SE.
*you can use charge attacks.
*It also has a snipe mode to decopin donuts in the distance.
*We have 1-min Decopins challenge(available after clearing Stage 7).
*Please handle your mouse with care.
*Please refrain from using Decopin and magic in the real world.
*You can enjoy Decopins2 even if you haven't played Decopins1.

We would like to thank everyone who played the Decopins series, everyone who created wonderful music and sound effects, everyone who created 3D assets, and UE4.
